description: The HomeLocationSetter component calls getCurrentPosition inside a Button onClick without debouncing. If a user double-clicks, it will trigger two geolocation requests. Debounce the button or disable it immediately on first click.
successCriteria: Button is disabled while loading or saveMutation.isPending (already done, but verify)
No duplicate geolocation requests on rapid clicks
Consider adding a 500ms debounce if the issue persists
